rule_text: The white badge mirrors the box's accent shape at smaller scale: border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px (also 5:1, large TL+BR). Never simplify to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.
intent: Keep the badge radius a scaled mirror of the box radius.
summary: Iconography white badge mimics box accent shape with border-radius 20px 4px 20px 4px, maintaining 5:1 ratio large top-left and bottom-right; no uniform radius, swaps, or flips.
